basic_details.job_title: District Civil Hospital Raigad Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Civil Hospital Raigad has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Medical Officer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 13-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with valid registration from the respective State Medical Council/NMC
qualification.details: MBBS with valid registration from the respective State Medical Council/NMC

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Civil Hospital Raigad Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: raigad.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Civil Hospital Raigad Medical Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the District Civil Hospital Raigad Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download District Civil Hospital Raigad Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS with valid registration from the respective State Medical Council/NMC

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for District Civil Hospital Raigad Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: raigad.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Civil Hospital Raigad Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for District Civil Hospital Raigad Medical Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Medical Officer post is 13 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Medical Officer post in the District Civil Hospital Raigad recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with valid registration from the respective State Medical Council or the National Medical Commission (NMC) to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants for the Medical Officer position is 60 years. There are no specific minimum age criteria mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Medical Officer position will receive a salary of Rs. 72,000 per month, as per the official notification details.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the District Civil Hospital Raigad Medical Officer Recruitment 2026. The fee is Nil for all applicants.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Medical Officer posts at District Civil Hospital Raigad is offline. Candidates need to send their completed application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer position includes a Written Examination followed by an Interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages to be considered for selection.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Medical Officer post is Alibag, which is located in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, with the pincode 402201.

faq.question: Q10. When was the advertisement for this recruitment released?
faq.answer: The official advertisement for the District Civil Hospital Raigad Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 was released on 26 June 2026, as per the important dates mentioned.
